title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Asian Paints

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Asian Paints
jsonLd.description:
Asian Paints is actively seeking a talented and motivated Production Engineer to join our dynamic team in Patna. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Asian Paints:
Asian Paints is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Asian Paints!
